data.title: 2026 Taiwan International Geothermal Conference: Linking Next-Generation Technology, Moving Towards Scalable Development
data.description: The 4th "2026 Taiwan International Geothermal Conference" (2026 TIGC) commenced on March 26, organized by the Ministry of Economic Affairs (MOEA) in Taipei. Vice Minister of Economic Affairs Chien-hsin Lai stressed the MOEA's commitment during the event.

data.title: The Largest Mobile Agriculture Lab Makes its Debut in Southwest Kansas
data.description: In Garden City, Kansas, Newman University has introduced its cutting-edge Smart Mobile Agriculture Lab worth over $1 million. This climate-controlled lab offers students the opportunity to gain practical skills using the most up-to-date technology. With activities ranging from drone piloting to simulated tractor driving, the largest mobile ag lab in the region allows students to acquire valuable field experience before completing their studies. The university is thrilled to share this educational resource with the community.

data.title: SEC states some crypto cases failed to benefit investors. Enforcements on public firms dropped by 30% under Chair Paul Atkins.
data.description: During Paul Atkins' tenure as SEC Chair, the amount of SEC enforcement actions targeting public companies has dropped by roughly 30%.
